name: Subterror Cave Clash
name_jp: サブテラーの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>激</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: All "Subterror" monsters you control gain 500 ATK and DEF for each Set monster on the field. Once per turn, when a "Subterror" monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 "Subterror" card in your Graveyard, except "Subterror Cave Clash"; add it to your hand.
eff: All "Subterror" monsters you control gain 500 ATK and DEF for each Set monster on the field. Once per turn, when a "Subterror" monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 "Subterror" card in your Graveyard, except "Subterror Cave Clash"; add it to your hand.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
